typical_use_cases: Greenfield or brownfield renewable, storage and grid assets with ring-fenced cash flows and bankable contracts.
Use-of-proceeds financing for eligible capex, retrofit programmes or portfolio build-out at the corporate level.
Portfolio refinancing, operating asset take-outs and repeat funding for issuers with credible reporting and market access.
General corporate purpose or capex financing where pricing is linked to borrower-level sustainability KPIs.
Capital markets financing for larger issuers that can commit to public transition KPIs and step-up structures.
Financing for decarbonisation pathways in hard-to-abate sectors where assets or plans may not be fully green today.
Capital markets instrument for transition capex or refinancing under a documented transition framework.

product_name: ESG-linked working capital / sustainable trade finance
typical_use_cases: Supply-chain finance, letters of credit, receivables and working-capital lines tied to sustainability performance or eligible trade flows.
Higher-risk, first-loss or concessional structures for new technologies, underserved segments or early-market platforms.
Revenue support or incentive structures linked to verified emissions reductions, carbon credits or outcomes-based programmes.
Refinancing diversified pools of operating assets such as rooftop solar, EV receivables or efficiency portfolios.
